character_designs.name_cn: 肃明重甲虫士兵多状态角色板
character_designs.identity: Mid-tier Suming War-Armor Office heavy infantry used for gate shielding, shield-wall pressure, heavy convoy escort, granary gates, and border-wall door defense

body_and_face.species_lock: Clearly non-human heavy insect infantry; never a human shield soldier, knight, or man in insect armor.
body_and_face.scale: Approximately 2.2 to 2.6 meters tall in-world, broader than ordinary insect infantry but below heavy carapace generals.
body_and_face.build: Thick chest and back carapace, short broad abdomen plates, outward pelvic carapace, stout hind limbs, heavy clawed feet, slow shield-wall posture.
body_and_face.lower_body_rule: Lower body is heavier than ordinary infantry but must not become the super-wide siege lower body of the heavy carapace general.
body_and_face.head: Low broad insect head with narrow compound eyes, thick bone-white mandible guard, dark-green neck membrane, no human face or hair.
body_and_face.back: Degenerated hard wings compressed into thick layered back armor plates.

constant_anchors: stout hind limbs and heavy clawed feet

state_designs.silhouette: Heavy insect body planted behind a black iron gate shield, short heavy spear tight to shield side, slow immovable guard posture.
state_designs.color_logic: Black-green carapace and black iron shield dominate; bone-white seals mark Suming institutional control.
required_details: shield must read as heavy gate shield, not knight shield
body must remain non-human behind the shield
lower body must stay visible enough to read stout insect legs

state_designs.silhouette: Forward pressure stance built for matching with two or three soldiers, shoulders, shield edge, and clawed feet forming a modular wall.
state_designs.color_logic: Dark shield and carapace mass create wall pressure, with restrained old iron and wax details.
required_details: movement reads slow and compressive, not Li Tang-style lunge
clawed feet must brace against ground
shield wall geometry must be clear

state_designs.silhouette: Clawed feet near wheel line, one limb bracing convoy chain, gate fork angled down, heavy body blocking the cart side.
state_designs.color_logic: Old iron chain and gate fork add convoy function over the same black-green heavy infantry body.
required_details: chain and gate fork must show heavy convoy control
soldier must not perform human-hand arrest actions
body remains a heavy insect guard, not a slave soldier

state_designs.silhouette: Gate shield and heavy clawed feet planted in blackstone snow, frost on old iron buckles and wax seal rings.
state_designs.color_logic: Snowline frost overlays the heavy Suming palette without turning the figure into Northern beastfolk.
required_details: still reads as Suming heavy insect soldier
large clawed feet and short broad abdomen remain visible

detail_panels.notes: Low broad insect head, narrow compound eyes, thick bone-white mandible guard, dark-green neck membrane.
Deep black-green chest and back carapace, deep-brown short broad abdomen, outward pelvic carapace.

detail_panels.purpose: Differentiate from Li Tang and heavy general.
detail_panels.notes: Stout hind limbs and heavy clawed feet: broader than infantry, not super-wide like a general.

detail_panels.purpose: Show institutional control and armor function.
detail_panels.notes: Bone-white insect-wax joint rings, old iron heavy straps, dark-green formation band.
Black iron gate shield, short heavy spear, heavy hook-sickle, gate fork, convoy chain.
Deep black-green heavy carapace, deep-brown abdomen, bone-white guard, bone-white wax, old iron, dark-green band, blackstone snow, muted dark-red impact mark.
